TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_beded, title = beded, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/beded} }

S.FORM: == beded == u sulit nu Hulam ŤúĽŤúď u sulit nu Lipun „Éą„É≥„ÉúšļúÁõģ„ĀĮ,„Éą„É≥„ÉúÁõģ„ĀģśėÜŤôę„Āß„Āā„āč. u sulit nu Amilika dragonfly u kamu nu Kabalan putit u siwkay nu beded u beded sa, u cilekay, matineng mibahel, sisakuband. tabaki ku mata, maazih ku zikuzana a duut. mukan tu papah nu lutuk atu kilang. mukan tu adidiay a cilekay. zumaay a natinengan Wp/ckv/Putit
S.PHON: == b…ôd…ôd == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam ** u sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺipun ******,**********. u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika dragonfr~…ĺj u kamu nu kabar~…ĺan putit u siwkaj nu b…ôd…ôd u b…ôd…ôd sa, u ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj, matin…ôŇč mibańß…ôr~…ĺ, sisakuband. tabaki ku mata, maazińß ku zikuzana a duut. mukan tu papańß nu r~…ĺutuk atu kir~…ĺaŇč. mukan tu adidiaj a ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj. zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan wp/ ¶k*/putit
S.FORM: == beded == u sulit nu Hulam ŤúĽŤúď u sulit nu Lipun „Éą„É≥„ÉúšļúÁõģ„ĀĮ,„Éą„É≥„ÉúÁõģ„ĀģśėÜŤôę„Āß„Āā„āč. u sulit nu Amilika dragonfly u kamu nu Kabalan putit u siwkay nu beded u beded sa, u cilekay, matineng mibahel, sisakuband. tabaki ku mata, maazih ku zikuzana a duut. mukan tu papah nu lutuk atu kilang. mukan tu adidiay a cilekay. zumaay a natinengan Wp/ckv/Putit
S.PHON: == b…ôd…ôd == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam ** u sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺipun ******,**********. u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika dragonfr~…ĺj u kamu nu kabar~…ĺan putit u siwkaj nu b…ôd…ôd u b…ôd…ôd sa, u ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj, matin…ôŇč mibańß…ôr~…ĺ, sisakuband. tabaki ku mata, maazińß ku zikuzana a duut. mukan tu papańß nu r~…ĺutuk atu kir~…ĺaŇč. mukan tu adidiaj a ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj. zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan wp/ ¶k*/putit
